text.title: Shell Productivity Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the operator log into this host interactively ≥1h/day?

branch.question: Which shell does the operator prefer?

text.example: Operator on a long-lived VPS session, bash preferred → install fzf/rg/bat/starship + wire history.
